response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack experience, open-source leadership via GISCollective, and Linux/architecture exposure, but the role demands German C1 and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing Head of Development position in a German consulting context. Leadership experience is also implicit (founder, mentoring via workshops) rather than explicit team-lead/management track record. Worth a screening call only if the German requirement is flexible or coachable.
strengths: 13+ years across web, embedded, GIS, and high-throughput systems with strong open-source and Linux background
Founder of GISCollective — demonstrates architecture ownership, Kubernetes deployment, and long-term product vision
Active community teaching (workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos) signaling mentoring aptitude and communication skills
concerns: German listed as Basic — far below the required C1 level for client advisory work
No explicit Head-of / Tech-Lead title or evidence of managing an interdisciplinary team and P&L-style project oversight
Limited demonstrable Python and UML modeling experience; primary stacks are TS/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source/Linux depth
Lack of explicit team leadership track record
